title: Migrate an event schema safely
description: Roll out an event payload change behind compatibility checks so producers and consumers never break mid-deploy.
body: Steps: 1. Classify the change as compatible (add optional field) or breaking (rename/remove/retype). 2. For compatible changes, deploy consumers tolerating both shapes first, then producers. 3. For breaking changes, introduce a new event version/topic, run both in parallel, migrate consumers, then retire the old. 4. Add a CI schema-registry compatibility check. 5. Verify replay of historical events still parses. Rollback point: keep the old field/version until all consumers confirm migration. Validation: compatibility tests pass for old-event/new-consumer and new-event/old-consumer, and replayed history parses.
